titleStmt.title: SII 25.177: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 177. (A.R. No. 177 of 1908.) TIRUNAṞAIYŪR, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Siddhanāthasvāmi temple.

This inscription commences with the praśasti, Pūmādu-puṇara, etc., of the king. The ends of the lines are built in. The extant portion of the record gives the details of the date viz., 5th year, Saturday, Pūram which may correspond to 5th May, 1123 A.D. The month may be Ṛishabha and the tithi being śu 9.

It seems to record a deed of agreement executed by the sabhai (sabhāvyavasthai) of Tirunaṟaiyur alias Pañchavanmādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu which met in the temple of the deity Siddhīśvaram-uḍaiyār pertaining to the sale of lands made over to this deity and the grant of 2 mā of lands as tirunundāviḷakkuppuṟam and oru mā-mukkāṇi-kiḻ-ēḻu-mā of lands as amāvāsippuṟam for the feeding of the śivayōgis on the day of Amāvāsi. The sabhai is stated to have executed this transaction of lands after receiving the price-value (śela-aṟa) from Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiya Mauṉadēvaṉ of Neṟkuṉṟam.

Among the boundaries of the lands thus sold, mention may be made of the Pavitramāṇikka-vadi and Rājēndraśōḻa-vāykkāl. The sabhai consist of a number of members including Kavuṇiyan Paramēśvaran Iḷaiya Tiruvēṅgaḍattāṉ and several others. The document is said to have been attested by Kaṇakkaṉ Mādānamaṅgalam-uḍaiyāṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmātu puṇara puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu nilavattanniruppatu malar manṉavar cūṭa manniya UrimaiThe ends of the lines are built in.
m ticaitoṟum valarppa veṅkali niṅki meyyaṟantaḻaippak kaliṅkamiriyakkaṭal malai naṭātti valaṅkoḷāḻi varaiyāḻi naṭātti Irucuṭaraḷavum Oru
nattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya koppara kecaripanmarāna tribhuvana cakravattikaḷ śrīvikrama coḷadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 5 Añcāvatu I
m canikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūrattināḷ kulottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭu tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭu tirunaṟaiyūrākiya pañcavamātevi catuppetima—
Iṟṟai nāḷāl Uṭaiyār siddhiśvaramuṭaiyār koyililey dhanmi ceytu kūṭṭakuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu sabhāpyavastaippaṭi Innāḷ—
nilaṅkaḷ Ūr māviyinta kaṭamaikkuc cilavāka Iṭṭa nirnilaṉ kāṇipokaṅkaḷ pokki Uṭalillātaṉavukkuc cilavāka var nilaṅkaḷil sommāka koḷvārkku sū—
var devatāṉamākakoṇṭu Iṟaiyili ceytukoḷvārkku Iṟaiyiḻiccikkuṭuttum Ipperkaḷukku Iṟaikkuṭalāka vastukkaḷ vāṅkippuka I—
vūr cittiśvaramuṭaiyārkku tirununtāviḷakkuppuṟamum Amāvāsitoṟum civayokikaḷ Amutu ceyvikkaikku Amutupaṭippuṟamumāka Āticaṇṭiśvara—
veṭṭuvittuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu pavittiramāṇikkavatikku meṟkum Irājentiracoḻavāykkālukku vaṭakkum nālāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟcatirattu nāṅkaḷ viṟ—
lattukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai Ittevar nilattukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai kaṇṇāṟṟukku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai comattiyan cirāmaṉ vaṭukanperil ki—
pāṟkellai meṟpaṭiy nilattukku teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta perunāṉku Ellai Uḷpaṭṭa rūpāy [] Innilamuṉṟumā mukkāṇikkiḻ Eḻumā—
śvaradevaṟku viṟṟuc cantirādittavaṟ Iṟaiyili ceytu neṟkuṉṟamuṭai tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiya mauṉatevan pakkal
yccela Aṟakkoṇṭu Ittevaṟkut tirununtāviḷakkup puṟam Iraṇṭumāvum Amāvāsippuṟam Oru māmukkāṇi kiḻ Eḻu
ndrādittavaṟ Iṟaiyiliy cetukuṭuttom mahāsabhai yom Inta sabhai Uḷḷirunta kavuṇiyan parameśvaran Iḷaiya tiruveṅkaṭattāṉ
kāśyapan nārāyaṇan kecuvapaṭṭarum vācciyan śrīvāsudevan cittiśvaramuṭaiyārum pāratāyaṉ sarvvakirutu‘sarvvatratu’parañcotiyārum vācciyan śrīvāsudeva
n tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyān colai Aracupaṭṭarum pāratāyan veṇṇaikkūttan vaṭamāturaippiṟaṉtān paṭṭarum comattiriyan caṅkaranārāyaṇan tiruca
cciyan peṉuvār kūttappirānpaṭṭarum kavuṇiyan kovan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān paṭṭarum pāratāyan kovan nārum mokiliyan
ṭṭarum kavuṇiyan śrī ṟkkaṭalārum kavuṇiyan parameśvaran tiruveṅkaṭattārum kavuṇiyan parameśvaran kūttappirān paṭṭarum
ivvūrk kaṇakkan mātāna maṅkalamuṭaiyānnen Ivai Enneḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 25.177 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
